case_title: ARTEM GEVORKYAN ET AL VS. TAYLOR ALEXIS CHRISTIAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,347.90 FILED BY GEVORKYAN, ARTEM SARKISOV, ANDREY AS TO DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN, TAYLOR ALEXIS THOMPSON, BIVETT BRACKETT WILLHITE, STACY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS:THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND.MULTIPLE ATTEMPTS WERE MADE AT VARIOUS TIMES ON VARIOUS DATES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEVORKYAN, ARTEM SARKISOV, ANDREY AS TO DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN, TAYLOR ALEXIS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-07-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-07-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO BIVETT BRACKETT THOMPSON BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-28-2016 AT 8:30 AM PER PLAINTIFF ARTEM GEVORKYAN'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF ARTEM GEVORKYAN PRESENT. DEFENDANTS TAYLOR ALEXIS CHRISTIAN AND BIVETT BRACKETT THOMPSON PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-07-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO BIVETT BRACKETT AND STACY WILLHITE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-28-2016 AT 8:30 AM PER PLAINTIFF ARTEM GEVORKYAN'S REQUEST. DEFENDANTS TAYLOR ALEXIS CHRISTIAN AND BIVETT BRACKETT THOMPSON PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEVORKYAN, ARTEM SARKISOV, ANDREY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN, TAYLOR ALEXIS $6,312.90 PRINCIPAL, $174.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,486.90, THE JUDGMENT IS ALLOCATED AS FOLLOWS: ARTEM GEVORKYAN- $4,274.40; ANDREY SARKISOV - $2,038.50. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
